key.name: settings-version
key.summary: The version of the settings to update from.

key.name: pipelines
key.summary: A dictionnary describing the different pipelines and their effects.

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Global gaussian sigma to use

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Global brightness to use

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Deprecated global corner radius used for settings migration

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: color-and-noise
key.summary: Boolean, controls wether or not the color and noise effects are in use globally

key.name: disable-clipped-redraws
key.summary: Disable clipped redraws globally to work around dynamic blur artifacts

key.name: hacks-level
key.summary: Deprecated artifact-handling level, kept for settings migration only

key.name: debug
key.summary: Boolean, set to true to activate debug mode (more verbose journalctl logs)

key.name: profile-static-blur
key.summary: Default blur mode for surfaces using the global profile

key.name: profile-pipeline
key.summary: Default pipeline for surfaces using the global profile

key.name: profile-override-background
key.summary: Default background override setting for surfaces using the global profile

key.name: profile-background-style
key.summary: Default background style for surfaces using the global profile

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: style-components
key.summary: Enum to select the style of the components in overview (0 not styled, 1 light, 2 dark, 3 transparent)

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: style-dialogs
key.summary: Enum to select the style of the appfolder dialogs (0 not styled, 1 transparent, 2 light, 3 dark)

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: use-global
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use the global blur profile for this component

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: static-blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use a static or dynamic blur for this component

key.name: unblur-in-overview
key.summary: Boolean, whether to disable blur from this component when opening the overview or not

key.name: force-light-text
key.summary: Boolean, whether or not to force the panel to have light text, useful when using light theme

key.name: override-background
key.summary: Boolean, whether to override the background or not

key.name: style-panel
key.summary: Enum to select the style of the panel (0 transparent, 1 light, 2 dark, 3 contrasted)

key.name: override-background-dynamically
key.summary: Boolean, whether to enable certain effect for this component when a window is close to the panel

key.name: override-background-dynamically-mode
key.summary: Enum to select the override mode (0 Blur on Window Proximity, 1 Background on Window Proximity). Required "override-background-dynamically" to be enabled.

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: use-global
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use the global blur profile for this component

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: static-blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use static or dynamic blur for this component

key.name: override-background
key.summary: Boolean, whether to override the background or not

key.name: style-dash-to-dock
key.summary: Enum to select the style of dash to dock (0 transparent, 1 light, 2 dark)

key.name: unblur-in-overview
key.summary: Boolean, whether to disable blur from this component when opening the overview or not

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: use-global
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use the global blur profile for this component

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: static-blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use static or dynamic blur for this component

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: corner-when-maximized
key.summary: Boolean, whether to keep rounding the corners of fullscreen and maximized window or not

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: opacity
key.summary: Opacity of the window actor on top of the blur effect

key.name: dynamic-opacity
key.summary: Wether or not to make the focused window opaque

key.name: blur-on-overview
key.summary: Wether or not to blur applications on the overview

key.name: enable-all
key.summary: Wether or not to blur all applications by default

key.name: whitelist
key.summary: List of applications to blur

key.name: blacklist
key.summary: List of applications not to blur

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: use-global
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use the global blur profile for this component

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur popup menus, notifications, switchers, and dialogs or not

key.name: use-global
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use the global blur profile for popup blur

key.name: static-blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to use a static blur on popup surfaces

key.name: pipeline
key.summary: String, the name of the pipeline to use. It must exist, else "pipeline_default" will be used

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: menu-corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for popup menu corner rounding

key.name: quick-settings-corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for quick settings and calendar corner rounding

key.name: notification-corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for notification corner rounding

key.name: osd-corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for OSD and switcher corner rounding

key.name: dialog-corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for dialog corner rounding

key.name: override-background
key.summary: Boolean, whether to override the background or not

key.name: style-popup
key.summary: Enum to select the style of popup surfaces (0 transparent, 1 light, 2 dark, 3 automatic)

key.name: compatibility
key.summary: Boolean, whether to try compatibility with hidetopbar@mathieu.bidon.ca or not

key.name: blur-original-panel
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur the original panel (if option selected) with Dash to Panel
